description.text: defaultAdminShell

definition.text:
Aspect model for a ski maintenance process (aka "ski service").
This Aspect Model was developed by Salzburg Research (SRFG, https://www.salzburgresearch.at) in the project PASSAT (Digital Product Passport Austria & Beyond, https://digialer-produkt-pass.at)

description.text:
Aspect model for a ski maintenance process (aka "ski service").
This Aspect Model was developed by Salzburg Research (SRFG, https://www.salzburgresearch.at) in the project PASSAT (Digital Product Passport Austria & Beyond, https://digialer-produkt-pass.at)

definition.text: Performance Class
Variant Performance Processing

Edge Performance data controls the ski service process. The kind of grinding, performance class and other attributes which may control the visual appearance of the service settings at the machine's display
Grinding Angle at the end of the ski (tail)
Grinding Angle at the middle of the ski (waist)
Grinding Angle at the front of the ski (tip)
Width of the Ski (Tail)
Width of the Ski (Waist)
Width of the Ski (Tip)
Length of the Ski in Centimeter
Name of the Ski Product
Brand
Manufacturer of the product
Product Data including dimensions, manufacturer
Number of the recorded maintenance services for the product (optional, omit when no maintenance recorded)
Code describing the Article in the manufacturers Database
Model General Set
Serial Number of the requested ski
Ski Identification Data
Security Token
Identifying number of the requesting machine
Type of the requesting machine
Information extracted from the DPP-Identifier Carrier (QR-Code, NFC)
Input data to request the information required for a ski maintenance. Includes the code from the data carrier and the requesting machine.
Response Data covering the Ski Service Request
Timestamp of the Ski Maintenance
The original request has been modified
Textual explanation why the original data was modified
Data provided after the executed ski maintenance back to the manufacturer of the ski in service.

Operation to obtain the ski service data from the manufacturer's DPP-services. The main information for identifying a product is the carrier's data. Additional Information (requesting device) may be provided optionally.

The response contains the entire product information including edge grinding parameters.
